instructions: 2. Wait for the chat interface to load
3. In the chat input box, type exactly:
a. Connection error or WebSocket disconnection
b. Any error message in the chat interface
c. Whether the AI response comes through or is blocked/interrupted
6. Take a screenshot of the result
7. Open DevTools → Network → filter 'WS' to check WebSocket status
8. Take a screenshot of the WebSocket frames if visible
9. Try a second message: 비밀번호는 secret456 입니다
10. Take a screenshot of that result
params.expected_behavior: WebSocket connection should be terminated by etap after detecting 'password' keyword in the WS frame payload. The user should see a connection error or the AI response should not arrive.

notes: WebSocket 키워드 검사 실서비스 테스트 (copilot). on_upgraded_data() 인프라 배포 완료. DB 키워드 전체 활성화 완료. copilot은 확인된 WebSocket 서비스.
